programmes.show_description: Medieval action adventure with Clive Owen. In an age of honour and justice by the sword, a disgraced warrior seeks redemption by leading a band of soldiers to avenge his master's death. (2015)
Crime drama with Craig Fairbrass. When a British military contractor learns that his daughter has died, he arrives in Los Angeles to discover a stranger's body and sets out to find her. (2013)
Adventure with Babylon 5's Claudia Christian. A huge meteor begins to disintegrate over Earth, putting all life on it in grave danger. (2010)
Ambushed in the jungle, Roxton narrowly escapes with his life, but Death takes the form of a beautiful woman determined to claim his soul. S3, Ep12/22
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Sci-fi with Jack Coleman. A scientist scrambles to save his family - and the world - when a comet passes Earth and shifts the planet's magnetic field, leading to a deadly storm. (2009)
